validation.command: node --check src/control-plane/actions.js; node --check src/cli.js; node --check src/output.js; node --check src/errors.js

validation.summary: 16 tests passed, 0 failed; lifecycle ownership and JSON contract coverage is green.
12 tests passed, 0 failed; local managed CLI compatibility preserved.

controllerChecks: Global stop, force-stop, and restart route directly through action-layer stopManagedRun/restartManagedRun.
The rejected CLI fallback for action-layer ReferenceError was removed.
actions.js now defines task locking for lifecycle actions using project/task lock names consistent with the control-plane lock model.
stop JSON exposes stopped[] and failed[] for global lifecycle commands.
force-stop is routed but does not bypass the verified ownership gate.
restart JSON exposes stoppedRun, startedRun, and transactionId.
port_release_timeout surfaces as the direct domain error with next actions.
Failure and partial envelopes preserve next actions from LaunchdeckError details.
Leader process scan found no lifecycle fixture processes left after validation.
acceptedResidualRisks: Force-stop currently shares the verified ownership gate and does not add a separate stronger termination method; deeper force escalation remains bounded by future tasks or platform support.
Cross-platform lifecycle smoke remains a later release-gate task.
followUpWork: T025 join US3 owned restart and stop validation with ledger update.
